title: astragalus sagasteguii
intro: Astragalus sagasteguii is a species of legume in the pea family Fabaceae. It is native to Peru and is traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties. The plant is said to have adaptogenic and immunomodulatory effects, which can help to reduce inflammation and improve overall health by stimulating the immune system and increasing energy levels. Astragalus sagasteguii is typically prepared as a tea, capsule, or tincture, and is often used in traditional herbal medicine to support immune function, reduce stress, and promote overall well-being.
